reason.description:
Essentially switch to PEP 649 / 749 for annotations. Some tests need to be skipped for now, but the rest is working.

Fixes #1326

We probably should open issues for the failing tests, but I'd rather do that only after the first alpha.
commit_messages:
Restore basic functionality on 3.14[sic]

Essentially switch to PEP 649 / 749 for annotations. Some tests need to
be skipped for now, but the rest is working.

Fixes #1326
Use imprerative xfails instead of skips
